locations.name: The Study
locations.description: A warm wood-paneled room in a modern western chalet with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and a broad oak desk. Papers are stacked neatly. Natural light streams through tall alpine windows. The steward and heir are both present.

locations.name: The Archive Room
locations.description: A narrow room lined floor to ceiling with document shelves. Soft daylight filters through a high window. A locked cabinet stands against the far wall.
